description_long: This vending machine is a tall, rectangular unit with a black exterior and a glass front panel displaying a variety of beverages arranged in rows. The front features a keypad, a digital display, a coin slot, a bill acceptor, and a product retrieval slot labeled 'PUSH.' The left side has a vintage-style Dr. Pepper advertisement with a bottle and retro text, while the right side displays a red sign reading 'KEEP CALM AND KEEP THE CANTEEN CLEAN.' The back of the machine reveals a series of metal cooling coils and ventilation grilles, indicating refrigeration capability. The machine stands on small feet and has a robust, industrial appearance suitable for urban environments. The overall design is functional, with clear areas for interaction and branding.
description: A tall, black vending machine with a glass front displaying beverages, a keypad, payment slots, and retro signage on the sides.
description_view_0: The back view shows exposed metal cooling coils and ventilation grilles, emphasizing the machine's refrigeration system.
description_view_1: The left side features a large, vintage Dr. Pepper advertisement with a bottle and colorful retro graphics.
description_view_2: The front view displays the glass product window, keypad, payment slots, digital display, and the 'PUSH' retrieval slot.
description_view_3: The right side has a red sign with white text: 'KEEP CALM AND KEEP THE CANTEEN CLEAN.'
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular digital display panel is located on the upper right section of the front, above the keypad and payment slots, showing illuminated content.
attribute_payment_interface: The payment interface includes a coin slot, a bill acceptor, and possibly a card reader, all located to the right of the glass display window, below the digital display.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A numeric keypad with individual square buttons is present on the front, arranged in a grid to the right of the product window.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, rectangular retrieval slot labeled 'PUSH' is located at the bottom center of the front panel, with a flap for accessing purchased items.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Branding includes a vintage Dr. Pepper advertisement on the left side, a red 'KEEP CALM AND KEEP THE CANTEEN CLEAN' sign on the right, and a small Pepsi logo on the upper right of the front.
